question_text: Which of the following best describes a moment?

options.label: A
options.text: The amount of time it takes an object to fall

options.label: B
options.text: The turning effect of a force around a pivot

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object measured in kilograms

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which an object is moving

explanation: A moment is the turning effect produced when a force acts on an object at a distance from a pivot point. It is not related to time, weight, or speed.
